posts.author: Shoaibali450 (Shoaib Ali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com Community,

I’m currently using the Workload Widget to manage our team’s tasks and capacity. However, I’ve encountered a challenge that I hope some of you Pros might be able to help with.

Use Case:

I need to allocate scheduled hours to team members in a way that is not equally distributed. Instead, I want to custom-select the hours assigned to each task for each team member. For example, instead of evenly splitting 10 hours across 2 team members (5 hours each), I might need to assign 7 hours to one member and 3 hours to another, depending on their availability and expertise.

Request:

  • Are there any insights or best practices you can share for achieving this with the current Workload Widget?
  • Can anyone recommend a marketplace app that allows custom hour allocation per task and team member, while also providing a comprehensive workload capacity view?

Your assistance will be greatly appreciated as it will significantly improve our project management and resource allocation efficiency.

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: polina.kurotskina (Polina Kurotskina)
posts.cookedHtml: Also looking for this to be done!

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Shoaibali450

monday.com offers an intuitive workflow dashboard template (available in all plan types). By configuring and implementing this template, you can easily monitor the progress of your projects from a single interface. Besides, this template offers robust work scheduling functionality. With this feature, you can schedule different work hours for each team member based on their expertise and availability. The template also tracks the working duration of employees and records the status based on the uptime.

This enables you to allocate work schedules distinctively and observe the work progress of all members without any disruption. If you want to implement the workflow dashboard template, hiring our monday.com consultants is a worthwhile option. They can configure and implement the dashboard based on your workflow requirements.

Kindly share your requirements with us!
